title: Flea Treatment in Kew Gardens Hills, Queens | $350-$650 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional flea treatment in Kew Gardens Hills, Queens. Expert flea extermination for homes and apartments. Same-day service available. Call Best Pest Control NYC today!
intro: Dealing with a flea infestation in your Kew Gardens Hills home? Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive flea treatment services throughout this vibrant Queens neighborhood. Our experienced technicians use proven methods to eliminate fleas at every life stage, protecting your family and pets from these persistent pests.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has been serving Kew Gardens Hills residents for years with fast, effective flea treatments tailored to the unique needs of Queens homes and apartments. Our licensed exterminators use safe, family-friendly solutions and offer flexible scheduling to accommodate your busy lifestyle, with most treatments completed in a single visit.
localContext: Kew Gardens Hills, with its mix of single-family homes, garden apartments, and co-ops near landmarks like the Queens Jewish Center and close to Flushing, presents unique pest control challenges. The neighborhood's tree-lined streets and proximity to parks make flea prevention especially important for pet owners and families in this close-knit community.

faqs.question: How much does flea treatment cost in Kew Gardens Hills?
faqs.answer: Flea treatment in Kew Gardens Hills typically ranges from $350 to $650, depending on the size of your home, severity of the infestation, and whether multiple rooms or floors require treatment. We provide free estimates and transparent pricing before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How long does flea treatment take to work?
faqs.answer: You'll notice a significant reduction in flea activity within 24-48 hours after treatment. Complete elimination typically takes 2-3 weeks as eggs hatch and are exposed to the treatment. We provide follow-up instructions and are available for a second treatment if needed to break the flea life cycle.

faqs.question: Is flea treatment safe for my pets and children?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products that are safe for pets and children when applied correctly. We recommend keeping pets and children away from treated areas for 2-4 hours until surfaces dry. Our technicians will provide specific safety instructions based on the products used in your home.

faqs.question: Do I need to prepare my home before flea treatment?
faqs.answer: Yes, preparation is important for effective treatment. We recommend vacuuming thoroughly, washing pet bedding, removing pet food and water bowls, and keeping pets away during treatment. Our team will provide a detailed preparation checklist when you schedule your appointment to ensure the best results.
